name: AerioTV Pairing
description: Pairs AerioTV Fire TV clients with Dispatcharr and serves the AerioTV sync document. Use the link below to open the pairing page. Docs: https://github.com/chickey/AerioTV-Android
author: AerioTV

fields.label: Pairing page
fields.help_text: Open the pairing page (same host/port as Dispatcharr): [Pairing page](/api/plugins/aeriotv/admin) — or the 'docs' link above. Run 'Open pairing admin page' below if you need a token link.

fields.label: Server base URL
fields.placeholder: Leave blank to use request host
fields.help_text: Optional URL returned to AerioTV after approval, for example http://tvserver.local:9191.

fields.label: Pairing code to approve
fields.help_text: Enter the 4 digit code shown by AerioTV, then run Approve pairing.

fields.label: Dispatcharr profile ID
fields.help_text: Initial profile ID to return to AerioTV. This can become a selector once the plugin UI is richer.

fields.label: API key returned to AerioTV
fields.help_text: Temporary Phase 4 bridge. If set, this API key is returned as the device token so AerioTV can call existing Dispatcharr APIs.

fields.label: Device ID to revoke
fields.help_text: Paste a device ID from List paired devices, then run Revoke device to invalidate its token.

actions.label: Open pairing admin page
actions.description: Generates a tokenised link to the Link Device / Paired Devices web page (valid 30 days).

actions.label: List pending pairings
actions.description: Shows pending AerioTV devices waiting for approval.

actions.label: Approve pairing
actions.description: Approves the code entered in plugin settings and issues a device token.

actions.label: List paired devices
actions.description: Shows Fire TV devices paired with this plugin.

actions.label: Revoke device
actions.description: Revokes the device ID entered in plugin settings and invalidates its token.
